notes: Formed 1994 by merger of SynOptics and Wellfleet Communications. Acquired by Nortel for $9.1B in June 1998. Nortel later sold enterprise networking to Avaya (2009). Bay SOHO line spun out as Netgear (1999).
Acquired by Bay Networks in November 1996; provided BayDSP modem technology used in 5399 and 8000 RAC products.

successor: Acquired Bay Networks 1998; filed bankruptcy 2009; assets sold to various acquirers
notes: Acquired Bay Networks for $9.1B in 1998; renamed Nortel Networks; filed for bankruptcy December 2009.
